global.description: The ad features a modern design with layered visual elements and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a weekend escape deal for $4.99.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A solid color background occupying the top portion of the ad, providing a clean and modern look.

elements.label: Main visual area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center featuring abstract shapes, creating a visually engaging focal point.

elements.label: Secondary visual area
elements.description: Another rectangular shape in the center, slightly overlapping with the main visual area, adding depth.

elements.label: Additional visual area
elements.description: A smaller rectangle in the center, contributing to the layered visual effect.

elements.label: Overlapping visual area
elements.description: A narrow rectangle positioned centrally, enhancing the complexity of the design.

elements.label: Left visual area
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape on the left side of the center, adding variety to the composition.

elements.label: Right visual area
elements.description: A larger rectangular shape on the right side, balancing the overall visual weight.

elements.label: Small visual area
elements.description: A small circular shape in the center, providing a contrast to the rectangular elements.

elements.label: Body text area
elements.description: A small text area positioned lower in the center, containing promotional information.

elements.label: Additional body text
elements.description: A slightly smaller text area below the previous one, reinforcing the promotional message.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent text area at the bottom of the ad, urging viewers to take action with a clear message.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left, representing the brand identity.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag in the top left corner indicating user-generated content, adding credibility.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, clean and modern, promoting a weekend escape deal.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned, with the main visual elements in the center and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Escape this weekend, $4.99, Order now, HorizonHop, UGC
